authors: Yufan Guo Luqing Zhou School of Journalism and Communication
raw_title: (Trans)Locality in Social Media News Engagement: Geographic Effects on the Quality of Online Discussion
title_en: (Trans)Locality in Social Media News Engagement: Geographic Effects on the Quality of Online Discussion
title_zh: 社交媒体新闻参与中的（跨）地域性：地理因素对在线讨论质量的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了社交媒体上新闻参与的地理因素如何影响在线讨论的质量。它关注不同地区的人们在讨论新闻时的互动方式，以及地理位置是否会导致讨论内容或质量的差异。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how geographic factors in social media news engagement affect the quality of online discussions. It focuses on how people from different regions interact when discussing news and whether location leads to differences in discussion content or quality.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻学中社交媒体参与的地理维度研究，探索空间因素如何塑造在线公共讨论。
research_direction_en: Research on the geographic dimensions of social media engagement in digital journalism, exploring how spatial factors shape online public discourse.
